protocol: real numbers looked up AFTER synthetic distributions were recorded

results.question: Do you approve of Trump's job performance?
results.notes: approve 40.4 / disapprove 57.0

results.question: Do you approve of the way Congress is handling its job?
results.notes: approve 10 / disapprove 86

results.question: Is the economy getting better or worse?
results.notes: binary better/worse framing; no explicit 'same' option

results.question: Has your household income increased over the past year?
results.source: Gallup Economy and Personal Finance Survey
results.notes: wording caveat: Gallup asks 'financial situation getting better/worse'; CES asks 'household income increased/decreased'

results.question: Do you support increasing border patrol on the US-Mexico border?
results.notes: 59% favor, down from 76% in 2024; oppose/unsure estimated from residuals

results.question: Do you support a pathway to citizenship for Dreamers brought to the US as children?
results.notes: citizenship-with-requirements framing; oppose/unsure estimated

results.question: Do you support increasing deportation of undocumented immigrants?
results.notes: corroborated by Feb 2026 AP-NORC: 52% say deportations gone too far

results.question: Do you support repealing the Affordable Care Act?
results.source: KFF Health Tracking Poll (favorability proxy, n=1,343)
results.notes: unfavorable-to-ACA mapped to support-repeal; approximation

results.question: Do you support Medicare for all?
results.source: Economist/YouGov (corroborated by Data for Progress Nov 2025: 65%)
results.notes: no 2026 wave found from KFF/Gallup/Pew

results.question: Do you support the EPA regulating carbon dioxide emissions?
results.source: Yale Climate Change in the American Mind, Spring 2026
results.notes: framing caveat: real number is carbon-tax/pay-for-damages framing; EPA-CO2-regulation framings poll higher (~75% in Yale trend)

results.question: Do you support requiring renewable energy production?
results.notes: two independent sources converge at 65%

results.question: Do you support raising taxes on income over $400k?
results.notes: 58 raise / 19 lower / 21 keep-same (counted as unsure)

results.question: Do you support raising the minimum wage to $15 per hour?
results.notes: most recent clean $15 framing

results.question: Do you support forgiving student loan debt?
results.source: Data for Progress Mar 2026 + AP-NORC May 2024 composite
results.notes: composite estimate, uncertainty +/-10pp; CES item is the $20k framing

results.question: Do you support building a border wall?
results.notes: 56% favor substantially expanding the wall; oppose inferred from partisan splits

results.question: Do you support Medicaid expansion?
results.notes: no direct national expansion question fielded; derived from favorability + funding preferences

results.question: Do you support banning assault rifles?
results.notes: 52% support semiautomatic ban; oppose/unsure estimated from complement

results.question: Do you support background checks on all gun sales?
results.notes: 81-96% range across surveys; 88% conservative consensus; no 2025-26 poll found

results.question: Do you support allowing abortion as a matter of choice?
results.notes: legal all/most = yes, illegal all/most = no

results.question: Do you support providing arms to Ukraine?
results.notes: increase+maintain = yes (55); decrease+stop = no (22); corroborated by Chicago Council Feb 2026 (57%)
